nonBlockingIssues.description: allowsReverseInheritance() is defined (line 1063 of yj_to_epub_properties.go) but never called anywhere in the codebase. Dead code.
htmlText type is matched twice in a type switch (htmlText and *htmlText). The *htmlText case is likely dead code since htmlText is always used as a value type.
